meta.title: From ITALY to FRANCE
meta.message: The Winter Olympics are coming to a close. The closing ceremonies will see Italy hand off hosting duties to their neighbor France, where the winter games will be in four years.

ladder.clue: Change one letter in <> to get something that goes in a <>
Change one letter in <> to get a mammal
A <> {} is a tiny <> that's about 1/4 the volume of a <>
A Black <> is found in {} space
